message: Hmph, why not sit over there?
it's good to see you again.
??? Ariana, did something happen with this guy?
I just went to thank him for helping me with FLIX.
I see. Thanks for that the other day.
No, I'm just glad to be of help.
The atmosphere has changed to a cheerful one unlike before.
I feel like I might get dizzy from how close the two of them are.
This room can't honestly be called beautiful. This is
There's a kind of awkward atmosphere.
With my mother showing up and
it's probably hard for them to settle down.
Still, their expression has brightened compared to earlier.
After all, they look most charming when they’re near the boy they like.
They're scanning the area and seem to be avoiding eye contact with me.
They don’t seem too happy about their audition,
or about reuniting with their mother.
more like they're making a face like they've bitten into a bitter bug. What are they unhappy about?
With dyed hair and their casual outfit of a T-shirt and leather jacket, they totally radiate the vibe of a young aspiring musician.
but most decent adults probably wouldn’t approve.
They also don’t quite match up with them.
Everything will be settled after the audition, detective.
Then they'd definitely pass the audition for sure.
Make sure to pray hard too, detective,
They’ll be fine since I’m right by their side.
I don’t have to worry for a week. Ah,
What do you mean feeling refreshed?
Because, I was really worried, you know. But for a week, I can just think about
I've made up my mind! Detective, I've decided.
So, you will meet my birth mother, right?
I decided to think about it after the audition!
In a week! So, it's all good then.
How long are you gonna keep doing this? It's not like you.
Anyway, no matter the situation, the fact is, you are a mother.
I hate people who dwell on their problems.
It's about what happened the other day.
I'll do my best. With the audition and dealing with Ariana.
Sorry, it’s my schedule that messed things up.
No, just do your best with the audition.
You might be in for quite the disaster too.
I feel bad for interrupting your work.
You know, ever since Ariana came over to your place the other day, she's been really worried.
I get that you have work too, but I just wished you'd consider Ariana's feelings.
I really don’t care about me.
Are you working part-time at FLIX?
Not right now, I'm on break. She might come back, you know.
Ariana's had a tough time with that woman.
What do you mean she had a tough time with Gloria?
I don’t owe you an explanation about that.
What did you come here for?
I guess you're here to talk about that thing, right?
I don't really have anything to say.
You don’t even know about auditions?
Oh come on, I was just joking!
This is for the audition of a new rock band that's set to debut this spring.
Come on, don't blurt things out like that.
That's amazing! Debuting in spring is no small feat.
Right? It's decided, we’re debuting in spring!
make sure to buy the record when I debut.
Seems like he's more concerned about that than his own mother.
But for now, I’m just glad to see he seems to have perked up.
What if they say I can meet my biological parents in a week, but I don’t want to?
He must be bewildered to suddenly learn he has biological parents. His face looks troubled.
I wonder what he'll think when he finds out Meryl is his biological mom?
I can't say he's good-looking, but let's hope he can pass the audition based on talent.
They both naturally care for each other.
Maybe influenced by his mood, he’s got a sulky look. No, he probably just doesn’t like to flatter anyone.
Just because he’s not friendly doesn't mean he’s a bad guy.
